name: Bot /recents command + drop source from expense previews
description: Add a /recents command that shows the 6 most recent personal expenses for the linked user, formatted with the same compact summary line as natural chat (emoji + Vietnamese label · title · amount₫ · dd/MM, no source). Drop the sourceKey rendering from renderExpensePreviewText so /add preview, household-select, and post-create-apply no longer display payment source. /recents is personal-only (no household scope arg) and uses the standard recentsKeyboard (📋 Xem tất cả) pointing to the TMA expense list.

planned: Task: build /recents command + drop source from expense preview text.
done: apps/worker/src/bot/format/renderers.ts: renderExpensePreviewText third line now omits sourceKey (was `date · source · scope`, now `date · scope`). Added renderRecentsText({ expenses }) that builds a `Chi tiêu gần đây` header + one renderExpenseSummaryLine per item. Empty state: `Chưa có chi tiêu nào.`.

apps/worker/src/bot/commands/recents.ts (new): handleRecentsCommand queries listExpenses(db, { userId, limit: 6 }), maps StoredExpense.occurredAt (epoch ms) to YYYY-MM-DD, calls renderRecentsText, returns BotResponse with recentsKeyboard. Unlinked users get Open App guidance.
apps/worker/src/bot/service.ts: added handleRecentsCommand import and `case 'recents':` branch in switch.
apps/worker/src/bot/renderers/keyboards.ts: added recentsKeyboard(tmaUrl) → `📋 Xem tất cả` web_app button to TMA.

apps/worker/test/unit/bot/renderers/finance-text.spec.ts: added renderRecentsText tests (empty state + populated line shape) and a regression test asserting renderExpensePreviewText does NOT render source label.
verification: pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run test/unit/bot/renderers/finance-text.spec.ts test/unit/bot/renderers/keyboards.spec.ts -> 2 files, 38 tests passed (31 + 7; +3 new tests in finance-text.spec.ts).
pnpm --filter worker exec vitest run --cache -> 99 files, 629 tests passed (no regressions; +4 net new vs feat-122 baseline of 625).
./init.sh (full: install + harness check + lint/typecheck/test across web/worker/tma) -> Done!

notes: /recents is intentionally personal-only — household scope is not resolved. Natural chat (feat-121) already used the compact summary line without source; /recents uses the same shape so the two surfaces read consistently. Source label is still available in the data layer (sourceKey on StoredExpense) for future use (e.g. a TMA expense detail view) but is no longer rendered in bot chat.
